source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The majority function is a Boolean function \( f(x, y, z) \) that takes the value 1 whenever a majority of the variables \( x, y, z \) are 1. In the circuit diagram for the majority function shown in the <image>, the logic gates for the boxes labeled P and Q are, respectively:
